query: SELECT concat(p.name, ' - ', pv.name, ' => Stock:', pv.stockQuantity, ' Transit:', pv.inTransitQuantity) as detail FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 OR pv.stockQuantity > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT concat(p.name, ' - ', pv.name, ' => Stock:', pv.stockQuantity, ' Transit:', pv.inTransitQuantity) as detail FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 OR pv.stockQuantity > 0;
